1779.reason: [This consumes tokens without saving/restoring lexer state properly. The method modifies the lexer's position during lookahead but only restores from the initial saved state, potentially skipping over tokens or leaving the lexer in an inconsistent state.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This consumes tokens without saving/restoring lexer state properly. The method modifies the lexer's position during lookahead but only restores from the initial saved state, potentially skipping over tokens or leaving the lexer in an inconsistent state.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This call to parseLVal() consumes tokens during lookahead, modifying the lexer state and causing incorrect parsing position when the actual statement parsing occurs later. The method should only perform token inspection without advancing the lexer.]
